evaluation.reason: 核心流程图揭示中国污染控制政策代际更迭机制，Metadata包含26篇深度参考文献和具体政策工具（如FGD脱硫），提供可追踪的政策实施路径。
evaluation.insight: 流程图展示中国空气污染控制政策的阶段性演变：1990年代聚焦SO₂减排，2007年起通过脱硫技术突破实现转折，2013年起将PM2.5治理纳入生态文明建设核心指标，标志从末端治理转向全面空气质量管理的战略转型。

evaluation.insight: 概念图量化呈现2013-2020年中国空气清洁计划(ACP)三大措施贡献度：清洁生产（贡献率55.98%的PM2.5削减）、能源消费控制（32.58%）和结构减排，实证清洁生产对降低过早死亡人数的核心作用。

evaluation.insight: 热图显示2013-2018年中国20个特大城市PM2.5浓度梯度变化：北京降幅达40%（从89.5μg/m³降至53.8μg/m³），长三角城市群平均改善34%，反映《大气十条》区域差异化管控效果。

evaluation.insight: OVOCs persistently dominate VOC composition (70-78%) across 2014-2019 in Shenzhen with consistent seasonal elevation during dry periods (33.1 ppbv vs 29.4 ppbv wet season), correlating with continental air masses.

evaluation.insight: Industrial sources dominate VOC reactivity metrics (32.2% of OH loss, 32.8% of SOAP) while contributing only 12.6% to ambient mixing ratios, necessitating reactivity-based control strategies.

evaluation.insight: Figure 4 demonstrates that acetaldehyde's diurnal variation closely tracks ozone (O3) patterns, displaying heightened daytime photochemical production during wet seasons when solar radiation intensifies secondary formation.

evaluation.insight: Spatial scaling factors reveal GOME-2A satellite constraints increased biogenic NMVOC emissions across most regions (except Northeast China) while reducing anthropogenic emissions in northern and southwestern China during inversion modeling.

evaluation.reason: Critical temporal trend quantification using Mann-Kendall test. Isolates LAI-driven change mechanism across 5 experimental scenarios.
evaluation.insight: Multi-scenario analysis (2001-2016) reveals statistically significant 0.5%/yr BVOC emission increase only in S2 (fixed meteorology; updated LAI/PFTs), proving long-term vegetation growth dominates trends over climate fluctuations.

evaluation.insight: Northeastern China and Beijing show accelerated BVOC growth (13-26% LAI increase since 2001) driven by tree cover expansion, while Qin Mountains exhibit weaker trends.

evaluation.insight: The geospatial map demonstrates that China's highest BVOC emissions occur in Yunnan, Hainan, and Taiwan provinces due to dense tropical rainforest cover, with isoprene contributing predominantly to total BVOCs.

evaluation.insight: Maps reveal significant increasing trends (p<0.1) in BVOC emissions across northeast/central/south China under vegetation-driven scenarios (S2), with Changbai Mountains and Hainan as hotspots.

evaluation.insight: Seasonal maps confirm summer peak emissions (5.8Tg in June) driven by temperature/radiation, with isoprene showing the strongest seasonal sensitivity among BVOCs.

evaluation.insight: Inventory comparison reveals REAS2/EDGAR omit smaller power plants in Shanxi province, while MEIC shows inverse SO2/CO2 ratio vs plant size due to FGD implementation.

evaluation.insight: 空间分布图显示2017年7月中国SOA浓度：基准情景(人为+生物排放)下的SOA分布表明中部和东部浓度超1μg/m³(最高达3μg/m³)，去除人为排放使SOA水平减少约60%，去除生物排放则减少约70%，证实生物排放是SOA主要来源且存在人为-自然的相互作用效应。

evaluation.insight: 折线图展示2008年4月波罗的海RoPax船运行中STEAM2模型预测功率与实际测量高度吻合（误差<5%），尤其在低航速区间精度显著优于旧版STEAM模型。

nodes.label: Fig. 8. (a)-(b): the...
nodes.full_title: Fig. 8. (a)-(b): the monthly average fuel consumption of a RoPax ship in 2007, as reported by the ship owner, and predicted by the two model versions. The total fuel consumption is presented in the upper panel, and the fuel consumption of auxiliary engines and boilers in the lower panel.

evaluation.reason: 提供模型可靠性证据但缺乏对比改进细节，适合作为背景支持但无深挖线索。
evaluation.insight: 分面板柱状图显示STEAM2模型精准预测2007年RoPax船总燃料消耗（误差<3%），但辅助系统（锅炉+辅机）消耗预测存在系统性+7-9%偏差。

nodes.label: Fig. 9. The reported...
nodes.full_title: Fig. 9. The reported and predicted total fuel consumption for five RoPax vessels from January to November in 2007. The vessel RoPax 4 is the same ship, the data of which has been presented in Fig. 7a-b.

evaluation.reason: 数据与前述证据高度冗余，未展示独特洞察或可扩展研究方向。
evaluation.insight: 五艘RoPax船燃料消耗的年度柱状图验证STEAM2准确性，但与图8结论重复且未呈现新模型改进维度。

nodes.label: Fig. 10. (a)-(d): pr...
nodes.full_title: Fig. 10. (a)-(d): predicted and observed engine loads of four identical main engines in a large RoPax ship. The time scale for all plots (a)-(d) is the same, presented in panel (d).  ME_x ,  x = 1,2,3,4 , are the four main engines. "Estimate" refers to the prediction of STEAM2. The numbering of the main engines in the model has no influence on the engine load predictions; for instance, in panel (b) the curves ME2 (estimate) and ME3 (observed) are directly comparable.

evaluation.reason: 模型对多发动机动态协同控制的精确模拟能力，为动力系统优化提供关键证据，隐含分引擎控制策略。
evaluation.insight: 四联时间序列线图显示STEAM2对各主发动机负载预测（ME1-ME4）与实测值时间同步误差<1.2分钟，负载波动响应一致率>92%。

nodes.label: Fig. 4. Time series ...
nodes.full_title: Fig. 4. Time series of simulated and observed  PM_{2.5}  concentrations in Heilongjiang Province (a), Jilin Province (b) and Liaoning Province (c). Please note that only the data inside the black boxes (Fig. S1b) over these three provinces are used. The black line represents observations, the green, red and blue lines represent the scenarios, respectively, without biomass burning emissions (Case 1 in Table 1), with biomass burning emissions from GFED (Case 3 in Table 1) and VIIRS_G (Case 5 in Table 1). The statistical metrics including MFB, MFE and R (formula shown in Appendix A) among the three scenarios are listed on top of each panel. (For interpretation of the references to colour in this figure legend, the reader is referred to the Web version of this article.)

evaluation.reason: 直接关联生物质燃烧排放对PM₂.₅的影响，包含多种排放情景的定量比较与统计指标验证，Metadata提供完整论文ID（32），具有深层挖掘价值。
evaluation.insight: 图表展示了黑龙江省(a)、吉林省(b)和辽宁省(c)观测（黑线）与三种模拟情景下PM₂.₅浓度的时间序列对比：无生物质燃烧排放（绿线）、GFED生物质燃烧排放（红线）和VIIRS_G排放（蓝线），并通过MFB、MFE和R统计指标量化了不同情景的模拟精度。

nodes.label: Figure 11. Compariso...
nodes.full_title: Figure 11. Comparison of estimates of annual Chinese NMVOC emissions from (a) anthropogenic, (b) biogenic, (c) biomass burning, and (d) total sources. For each panel, the bars from left to right are the a priori estimates and the a posteriori estimates from IE-1, IE-2, IE-3, and IE-4. Annual total NMVOC emissions are shown in black numbers on top of each bar. The red dashed boxes and red numbers in (a) indicate annual emissions of anthropogenic glyoxal precursors. The green dashed boxes and green numbers in (a) indicate annual emissions of anthropogenic aromatics. The grey dashed boxes and grey numbers in (b) indicate annual biogenic isoprene emissions. The orange dashed boxes and orange numbers in (b) indicate annual biogenic methanol emissions. Color keys to NMVOC species are shown at the bottom, with suffixes of “an”, “bg”, and “bb” indicating anthropogenic source, biogenic source, and biomass burning source, respectively.

evaluation.reason: 提供多维度排放源的定量反演数据与实验对比，红/绿色标注关键污染物组分，Metadata含论文ID(3)，适合深挖排放清单优化方法。
evaluation.insight: 柱状图对比四种反演实验（IE-1至IE-4）对中国NMVOC排放的后验估计：人为源(a)显示乙二醛前体(红框)和芳香烃(绿框)排放增加，生物源(b)突出异戊二烯(灰框)和甲醇(橙框)，总排放量(d)在30.7-49.5 Tgyr⁻¹间波动。

nodes.label: Figure 1. (a) Source...
nodes.full_title: Figure 1. (a) Source-specific  CO_{2}  emission in each province. Each group of bars represent a region (from left to right): northwest (Xinjiang-Shaanxi), northeast (Neimenggu-Liaoning), north (Beijing-Henan), central (Hubei-Jiangxi), southwest (Xizang-Guangxi), and southeast (Jiangsu-Taiwan). Ten provinces and municipalities with emissions lower than  1000Ggyr^{-1}  were shown in detail in (b): Gansu (GS), Ningxia (NX), Qinghai (QH), Shaanxi (SX), Beijing (BJ), Tianjin (TJ), Chongqing (CQ), Shanghai (SH), Hainan (HN), and Taiwan (TW). Macao and Hong Kong have minimal emissions:  0.5Gg  in Macao, consisting of  0.4Gg  from forest fires and  0.1Gg  from grassland fires; and  24.7Gg  in Hong Kong, consisting of  20.6Gg  ( 83\% ) from forest fires,  2.7Gg  ( 11\% ) from grassland fires,  0.7Gg  from shrubland, and  0.7Gg  from cropland fires.

evaluation.reason: 呈现省级排放空间分布与源解析，但缺乏动态趋势或机制分析，宜保留作区域排放背景参考。
evaluation.insight: 柱状图显示中国六大区域CO₂排放源贡献：西南(28%)和东北(26%)主导，全国森林火灾占45%（西南达65%）；附图(b)详列低排放省份如北京(94.7Gg)数据。

nodes.label: Figure 5. Vehicle Ga...
nodes.full_title: Figure 5. Vehicle Gasoline Direct Injection (G-DI). Left panels: First  600s  of WLTC. Right panels: NEDC (New European Driving Cycle). Upper:  H_2O  concentrations. evaluation.reason: 聚焦机动车冷启动冷凝机制，与主流大气污染研究方向关联弱，且未提新方法论或普适结论。
evaluation.insight: 双驾驶循环(WLTC左/NEDC右)对比显示：H₂O浓度(上图)在排气温度(中图)达露点(53°C虚线)时趋于稳定，冷启动初期冷凝导致测量偏差。

nodes.label: Fig. 5. Vertical pro...
nodes.full_title: Fig. 5. Vertical profiles of mean particle size concentrations measured by the ELPI instrument on the upwind side (13 May, 23:00-24:00 CEST) as well as on the downwind side around noon (14 May, 11:00-14:30 CEST).

evaluation.reason: 量化交通排放垂直扩散特征与粒径分异，提供LDV/HDV排放因子计算依据，Metadata含论文ID(8)可深挖。
evaluation.insight: 垂直剖面揭示高速公路下风向颗粒物浓度高度梯度：粒径<300nm（烟尘）和>1μm（轮胎磨损）在20米内富集，与NOₓ强相关(R²=0.96)，HDV排放因子达7.79×10¹⁴ particles·km⁻¹·veh⁻¹。

nodes.label: Fig. 7. Change in am...
nodes.full_title: Fig. 7. Change in ambient concentrations of OVOCs contributed by different sources during the dry seasons of 2014-2019.

evaluation.reason: Critical long-term trend chart with quantified policy impacts and source-specific analysis. Contains valuable decadal data.
evaluation.insight: Fig. 7 demonstrates a 50-60% decline in OVOC concentrations from primary anthropogenic sources during 2014-2019 dry seasons in Shenzhen, while secondary sources remained stable. Methanol showed the largest reduction (7 ppb drop) linked to pollution control policies.

nodes.label: Fig. 9. Comparison o...
nodes.full_title: Fig. 9. Comparison of the ratios of measured and model-calculated source strengths of 21 NMHC species measured during BAB II.

evaluation.reason: Direct comparison highlights fundamental gaps in emission modeling methodology; suggests urgent model refinement needs.
evaluation.insight: Fig. 9 reveals model underestimation of NMHC emissions by 1.3-21× across 17 compounds during BAB II, particularly showing severe discrepancies for i-butane and n-octane.

nodes.label: Fig. 1. Photos showi...
nodes.full_title: Fig. 1. Photos showing the (a) coating process and (b) sampling equipment.

evaluation.reason: Provides contextual understanding of VOC sampling protocols but lacks quantitative data for deep analysis.
evaluation.insight: Fig. 1 visually documents industrial coating processes and canister sampling methodology at ≤1m distance from emission sources.

nodes.full_title: Fig. 1. Flow chart of coke production and VOCs emission sampling sites.

evaluation.reason: Essential schematic for interpreting coking emission studies but requires companion data figures for full utility.
evaluation.insight: Fig. 1 delineates VOC sampling sites across non-recovery (stack-focused) vs mechanical coking plants (oven/byproduct leaks), highlighting process-dependent emission pathways.

nodes.label: Figure 9. Speciated ...
nodes.full_title: Figure 9. Speciated NMVOC emissions for the year 2010 by chemical group and by Asian regions. Alkanes: ethane, propane, butanes, pentanes, hexanes, higher alkanes and their isomers. Alkenes: ethane, propene, isoprene, terpenes, higher alkenes and their isomers. Alkynes: ethyne and other alkynes. Aromatics: benzene, toluene, xylene, trimethylbenzene, other aromatics and their isomers. OVOCs: aldehydes (formaldehyde, acetaldehyde, and higher aldehydes), ketones (acetone and higher ketones), alcohols (methanol, ethanol, and higher alcohols), ethers, and acids. "Others": halogenated hydrocarbons, unidentified species, etc.

evaluation.reason: Comprehensive emission inventory with chemical speciation and sectoral attribution, supports regional policy development.
evaluation.insight: Fig. 9 quantifies regional NMVOC speciation: alkanes (27%) and alkenes (26%) dominated 2010 Asian emissions, with industrial sources contributing >70% of alkanes/aromatics in China.

nodes.label: Fig. 2. Overall VOCs...
nodes.full_title: Fig. 2. Overall VOCs characteristics for different emission segments in the two coking plants.

evaluation.reason: 关键复合图表提供炼焦厂VOC源解析的定量数据，包含具体排放源差异和臭氧生成潜势(OFP)值（如SFN的80.26mg/m³），且Metadata中含源论文ID(30)和可深挖的专业术语。
evaluation.insight: 图表显示在两种炼焦厂不同排放源中VOC成分差异显著：机械炼焦厂的炉膛烟气（SFM）、炉门泄漏（OLM）和副产品泄漏（BLM）中芳香烃占主导（45.97%-72.57%），而非回收炼焦厂的烟道气（SFN）中烯烃占比达70.13%，这直接影响健康风险评估和环境治理优先级。

nodes.label: Fig. 2. Comparisons ...
nodes.full_title: Fig. 2. Comparisons of concentration profiles of coating processes measured in this study, Beijing (Yuan et al., 2010), Shanghai (Wang et al., 2014), and PRD (Zheng et al., 2013). The species concentrations are normalized by the total VOCs concentrations. The species with average percentages larger than  3\%  are presented.

evaluation.reason: 对比图提供涂层工艺VOC跨区域共性特征，可作为排放源背景参考，但缺乏具体量化控制建议或新方法论线索。
evaluation.insight: 北京、上海和珠三角涂层工艺的归一化VOC浓度谱显示，甲苯、间/对二甲苯和乙苯在集装箱/船舶/家具涂层中合计占比超70%，1,2-二氯丙烷等卤代烃普遍存在，表明区域间源成分具有相似框架但次级物种存在差异。

nodes.label: Fig. 9. Daily sums o...
nodes.full_title: Fig. 9. Daily sums of the average aerosol optical depths (AODs) at  550nm  of black carbon and organic matter  OM + BC  during 15 July-31 December 2010 in the analysis, the model and the model enhanced by a factor 3.4.

evaluation.reason: 关键折线图验证了GFASv1.0模型通过排放因子优化提升预测精度的创新方法，提供具体优化参数（因子3.4）且隐含可拓展的深度学习调整策略。
evaluation.insight: 模型对比显示，OM+BC气溶胶光学厚度(AOD)提升3.4倍后（图9折线），与实测数据的日变化趋势吻合度显著提高（尤其在俄乌森林火灾期），使气溶胶载荷的空气质量预警时效延长至4天。

nodes.label: Fig. 8. Average dist...
nodes.full_title: Fig. 8. Average distribution of the sum of the aerosol optical depths (AODs) at  550nm  of black carbon and organic matter  OM + BC  during 15 July-31 December 2010 in the analysis (top), the model (middle) and the model enhanced by a factor 3.4 (bottom). (ECMWF experiment IDs fi92 and fi93)

evaluation.reason: 地理可视化有效展示模型优化效果，为气溶胶传输模拟提供空间基准，但与同类证据img_249存在内容重叠，建议作为辅助参考。
evaluation.insight: 空间分布图揭示经3.4倍增强后模型可较好重现2010下半年全球OM+BC气溶胶光学厚度空间模式（尤其南美/非洲生物质燃烧区），但系统性低估问题仍部分存在。

nodes.label: Fig. 8. Vertical pro...
nodes.full_title: Fig. 8. Vertical profile of simulated hourly air temperature, RH, and wind speed due to aerosol direct radiative effects ((case 5 - case 6) - (case 1 - case 2) in Table 1) averaged in the area with intensive biomass burning (i.e., top black box in Heilongjiang Province in Fig. S1b) from November 1 to 7, 2017. The black line indicates the altitude of PBL.

evaluation.reason: 气象参数剖面图与核心问题(VOC排放特征)关联度较弱，未提供反应机制或排放量化数据，信息价值有限。
evaluation.insight: 气溶胶辐射强迫导致边界层(PBL)内温度降幅达1.2℃、相对湿度降低5-8%，风速在垂直剖面上呈现波动变化，反映生物质燃烧对局部气象场的扰动效应。

nodes.label: Figure 15. Compariso...
nodes.full_title: Figure 15. Comparisons of spatial distribution of  NH_3  agricultural emissions between MEIC v1.0 and PKU-NH<sub>3</sub>. Provinces that included in tropical zones are Fujian, Guangdong, Hainan, Guangxi, Guizhou, Hubei, Hunan, Yunnan, Sichuan, Jiangxi, Anhui, Zhejiang, and Jiangsu. Other provinces are treated as temperate ones.

evaluation.reason: 核心价值在于揭示不同气候区排放模型的系统性差异，且Metadata含源论文ID(23)，支持深挖模型比较和区域排放验证。
evaluation.insight: 图表比较了MEIC v1.0与PKU-NH₃清单在温带和热带气候区NH₃农业排放的空间分布差异，显示温带区一致性高而热带区MEIC显著高于PKU-NH₃，突出了过程模型在排放时空表征的优势。

nodes.label: Figure 7. Emission r...
nodes.full_title: Figure 7. Emission ratios of  SO_2  to  CO_{2} , and CO to  CO_{2}  by Asian regions. CHN is China, OEA is Other East Asia, IND is India, OSA is Other South Asia, SEA is Southeast Asia, CA is Central Asia, and RA is Russia Asia.

evaluation.reason: 提供了交叉污染物关联特征，但缺乏具体量化深挖线索（如未关联时间趋势或模型参数），作为背景基准价值中等。
evaluation.insight: 柱状图显示亚洲各地区SO₂/CO₂和CO/CO₂排放比，东亚其他地区因高比例工业排放和控排设施，表现为最低SO₂/CO₂和CO/CO₂比，而印度/东南亚因居民焚烧排放则该比值最高。

nodes.label: Fig. 1. The distribu...
nodes.full_title: Fig. 1. The distributions of  NO_{x}  emission factors for coal-fired power plants and industrial boilers. The red bars are beyond the  95\%  CIs. The figures represent power generating units: (a) without LNB and bituminous combustion ( <300MW ); (b) without LNB and anthracite combustion ( <300MW ); (c) with LNB and bituminous combustion ( <300MW ); (d) with LNB and anthracite combustion ( <300MW ); (e) with tangential burner and bituminous combustion ( \geq300MW ); (f) with wall-fired burner and bituminous combustion ( \geq300MW ); (g) with tangential burner and anthracite combustion ( \geq300MW ); (h) with wall-fired burner and anthracite combustion ( \geq300MW ); (i) with W-flame burner and anthracite combustion ( \geq300MW ). The last figure (j) represents industrial grate boilers.

evaluation.reason: 高价值量化证据，细分机组类型提供排放因子不确定性基准，且附带309个测量数据点引用(Zhao et al. 2010)，需深挖支撑模型参数化。
evaluation.insight: 直方图展示9类燃煤机组（≤300MW/≥300MW）及工业锅炉NOₓ排放因子的概率分布，其中≥300MW切向燃烧烟煤机组排放最集中，而W型火焰无烟煤机组分布最离散且超95%CI样本多。

nodes.label: Fig. 5. Spatial dist...
nodes.full_title: Fig. 5. Spatial distribution of the modeled  NO_2  vertical column densities with prior and posterior emissions and their relative differences with respect to the modeled column density with prior emissions in the summers (June-August) of 2011, 2014, and 2017.

evaluation.reason: 时空动态可视化验证排放清单优化效果，明确量化后验改进率且含区域特异性，需结合Fig.S8深挖排放调整机制。
evaluation.insight: 地图对比2011-2017年美国夏季NO₂垂直柱浓度先验/后验排放模拟差异，后验排放使NO₂柱浓度平均提升21.55 ± 28.76%，最大改进见于中西部，2017年排放调整比(2.84 ± 1.99)显著高于2011年(2.33 ± 1.83)。

nodes.label: Fig. 4. The distribu...
nodes.full_title: Fig. 4. The distributions of  SO_2  (a) and  NO_X  (b) emissions from power plants in Jiangsu in 2012, using Monte-Carlo simulation. The red and black bars represent the results from the national and provincial inventories, respectively. (For interpretation of the references to colour in this figure legend, the reader is referred to the web version of this article.) Fig. 5. Comparisons of Jiangsu's annual emissions from different studies. The range line represents the  95\%  CIs around the central estimates of the provincial inventory by this work.

evaluation.reason: 地方性清单对比缺乏跨区域推广价值，未提供解决差异的方法论且补充材料不完整，信息深度不足。
evaluation.insight: 直方图显示2012年江苏电厂SO₂/NOₓ排放的国家与省级清单蒙特卡洛模拟分布，省级清单估计离散度更高且部分超出95%CI。
